== Notes for [[Item:Q3048|Q3048]] ==

Flint, Shirley Cushing. ''No Mere Shadows: Faces of Widowhood in Early Colonial Mexico''. University of New Mexico Press, Albuquerque, New Mexico, 2013, pages 107-122. … '''Chapter Six: “Doña María de Sosa Presents Her Case to the Crown”''' … http://books.google.com/books?id=Ks3ZORm9KlMC&pg=PA14&lpg=PA14&dq=alonso+de+estrada&source=bl&ots=QtXmOGy0uh&sig=TGsWtkIv3AyjMDeWh3dhaLpbLX8&hl=en&sa=X&ei=eHtQVNioHZawyASQ_ILACQ&ved=0CEUQ6AEwBjgK#v=onepage&q=alonso%20de%20estrada&f=false

----

THERE IS NO PROOF WHATSOEVER THAT THIS PERSON IS THE CHILD OF ANA ESTRADA AND HER HUSBAND.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADAE52611EFBBFA9822EF79916C3F45
geni:6000000017386285842


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
